name: Buxton Rural East

locations.address:
Chapel-en-le-Frith Enquiry Office, 
Manchester Road, 
Chapel-en-le-Frith

description:
This Safer Neighbourhood area covers the rural areas to the east of Buxton. It belongs to the High Peak Local Policing Unit.
The area covers the area east of Buxton, including Wormhill, Peak Dale and Peak Forest.
